codeReview.summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff for the fix rerun. All blocking issues from the prior byok-optimize synthesis are addressed: OAuth callbacks now persist `connection_method='oauth'`, optimize API enforces platform length limits and validates/splits oversized Twitter thread parts, ScriptGenerator now threads source platform into OptimizePanel, BulkPublishPanel uses resolved promise results (including retry path) instead of stale closure state, PATCH /api/posts/[id] compares incoming script/caption values against existing values before triggering auto-optimize, and publish OAuth lookup includes legacy NULL rows via `.or('connection_method.is.null,connection_method.eq.oauth')`.

issues.description: `savePlatformConfig` remains declared but unused, and the related `platformConfig` state is no longer wired into rendered settings controls. This dead code from the prior review is still present.

`variant_group_id` is generated inside `handleSaveAsPost` per click (`crypto.randomUUID()`), so saving multiple variants from one optimize run still yields different group IDs instead of a stable shared group.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker skill still appears misaligned with actual fix-run verification behavior. The skill requires manual verification with dev server + agent-browser/curl, but this fix run reported `followedProcedure: true` without those steps in the transcript skeleton.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md step 5 requires `PORT=3000 npm run dev`, `agent-browser` for UI features, and curl API checks; transcript skeleton for workerSessionId 3edf516a-6d0d-4e33-a5ad-505c9819394f contains no agent-browser invocation and no dev-server/curl steps.

summary: Pass. The fix feature resolves every previously synthesized blocking issue for byok-optimize. Two prior non-blocking cleanup items remain (unused platform config code in settings and per-save variant_group_id generation in OptimizePanel).
